rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners' motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents is GRANTED. Respondent must serve further responses within 30 days of this ruling. Further responses must be in compliance with CCP Sections 2031.210 and 2031.220. Respondent must respond separately to each numbered request. Each response must bear the same number and be in the same sequence as the corresponding item in the request. All objections are waived. The verification must include respondent's handwritten signature. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $990 are awarded against respondent. If you choose to contest this tentative order, you must contact opposing counsel and the court no later than March 26, 2014, 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BJ HERRAN REVOCABLE TR ESTABLISHED 4/13/2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Phyllis Berensons Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Judicial Notice; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Contestants Kate Hilburn and Justin Bennett are to file a Second Amended Complaint setting forth with specificity the damages they incurred as a result of the alleged undue influence and elder abuse. The Second Amended Complaint must be filed no later than April 11, 2014. The prevailing party is to prepare an order consistent with this tentative ruling. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. today (3/26/2014) and must give notice to the opposing party. Failure to so notify court and counsel will mean that the matter is submitted.
